text_prompt: A single continuous medium close-up in a quiet studio. A woman faces the camera and clearly says, "The morning train arrives at seven." Her lips follow every word. The camera is locked off with no cuts. Synchronized audio contains clean female speech and faint indoor room tone.

A single continuous shot in a rehearsal room. A standing musician claps twice, strikes a small drum once, and closes a wooden door. Each visible action is immediately matched by its sound. The camera remains fixed with no cuts. Synchronized audio contains two sharp claps, one deep drum hit, one wooden door slam, and light room reverberation; no speech or music.

A smooth tracking shot follows a cyclist through a wet city street at dawn while the camera moves alongside the bicycle. Reflections slide across the pavement and nearby buildings pass in the background, with no cuts. Synchronized audio contains spinning tires on wet asphalt, a soft bicycle chain, one clear bell ring, distant traffic, and light wind; no speech or music.

A locked-off wide shot of an empty library reading room at night. Closed books rest on long tables, a curtain moves slightly beside one window, and nothing else changes. There are no people and no cuts. The soundscape is very quiet: faint room tone, a soft ventilation hum, and an occasional distant clock tick; no speech or music.
